title: Self-Signed TLS Certificate Detected
description: The TLS certificate on port 443 is self-signed (subject and issuer both 'vm-apache'). Self-signed certificates are not trusted by browsers and indicate missing CA-signed deployment.
recommendation: Review and apply hardening via Ansible.

title: TLS Issue: DNS_CAArecord
description: No DNS CAA record is configured. This does not expose data directly, but allows any CA to issue certificates for the domain unless restricted.
recommendation: Review and apply hardening via Ansible.
evidence_observed: TestSSL performed check 'DNS_CAArecord' and returned vague value: '--'
